---
title: Week notes (2026-W21)
date: 2026-05-22
date-modified: today
categories:
  - week notes
---

- Resolved some feedback to the emails analysis paper
- Worked on code tree documentation and refinement
- Setting up and refining workflow for accessing the GPU cluster

- Off work hours:
  - Drafting an application for the Gerda Henkel research scholarship
  - Drafting a proposal to pursue a MSCA (pending discussion with involved parties)
  - Work on the pipeline for developing the BibVik citation graph
